_team_note: SORT: Keep team members in LAST NAME alphabetical order. Set linkedin to null if no link.

team.name: Anthony Benigno
team.title: Social Media Manager
team.bio: Film critic, WWE 2K dialogue writer, Webby-nominated podcast producer. Fluent in French. Has opinions about everything.

team.name: Jonathan "JC" Carmona
team.title: Director, Social Media
team.bio: Led social & influencer for Meta Quest — including the Resident Evil 4 VR launch. Now making EA1 clients culturally unmissable.

team.name: Kenyatta Cheese
team.title: CEO / Co-Founder
team.bio: Co-founded Know Your Meme. Once built a backpack livestream rig to broadcast protests live. Has been connecting people since dial-up.

team.name: Cooper Crowell
team.title: Audience & Insights Analyst
team.bio: EA1’s resident trend-spotter. Writes the internal newsletter keeping the team ahead of AI, the creator economy, and everything else.

team.name: Rachel García
team.title: Chief Business Officer
team.bio: Drafted speeches for Congress, then delivered Doctor Who’s biggest season premiere ever at BBC America. Fans & constituents: same playbook.

team.name: Gretchen Hansen
team.title: Senior Social Media Director
team.bio: Longtime writer, editor, and talent wrangler for BBC, Bravo, and NBCU — and once wrote a newsletter for 100K Nate Berkus fans.

team.name: Tommy McPhail
team.title: Associate Social Media Director
team.bio: Shaped social for your fave films & TV since MySpace. VCU grad and #1 Fall Out Boy fan. Oscar receipts upon request.

team.name: Mariana Romero
team.title: Social Media Manager
team.bio: Ran social for Aretha Franklin, Juan Gabriel, and Jefferson Airplane before bringing that energy to film and TV. Oxford & Emory educated.

team.name: John J Salomone
team.title: Senior Design Manager
team.bio: BFA from Brooklyn College. Former CollegeHumor/Dorkly illustrator. Still the most visually opinionated person in any room.

team.name: Kayte Williams
team.title: Head of Client Operations
team.bio: Built first-to-market digital partnerships at Bravo, drove marketing at BBC America, and keeps EA1 running like a well-oiled machine.

team.name: Izellah Zhang
team.title: Social Media Intern
team.bio: Brown ’24, Literary Arts & English Nonfiction. Now getting her Masters at USC. The most well-read person in almost any building.

_pets_note: SORT: Keep pets in FIRST NAME alphabetical order.

pets.name: Beau
pets.bio: World-class napper. Has never attended a single meeting and still gets top performance reviews.

pets.name: Chuy
pets.bio: Licensed golf cart operator. Smiles on command. Will work for literally any treat.

pets.name: Elle
pets.bio: Fashion icon. Balances toys on her head for content. Has more followers than most of us.

pets.name: Gigi
pets.bio: Supervises all Zoom calls from the back of the couch. Judges your posture silently.

pets.name: Holly
pets.bio: Chief enthusiasm officer. Those ears pick up Wi-Fi. Has never once played it cool.

pets.name: Liberty
pets.bio: Senior lounge strategist. Maintains a strict schedule of sitting, judging, and looking regal.

pets.name: Loaf
pets.bio: Named after bread, lives for bread. A corgi-sized morale boost with an industrial-grade appetite.

pets.name: Luoluo
pets.bio: Deep thinker. Stares out windows professionally. Has opinions about pillow placement.

pets.name: Mr. Boo
pets.bio: Office shadow. Appears silently in doorways. The only team member who truly understands darkness.

pets.name: Penn
pets.bio: Head tilter. Big-eyed negotiator. Has never lost an argument about dinnertime.

pets.name: Salem & Mishka
pets.bio: A two-cat operation. One plots, the other executes. Neither has ever been caught.

pets.name: Sally & Luna
pets.bio: Identical twins, shared chaos energy. Four golden eyes, zero respect for personal space.
